flashcards.definition: SSA configuration; may yield 0, 1, or 2 valid triangles.
sin B > 1 → the given side is too short to form a triangle.
sin B = 1 (right triangle) or the supplement B' makes A + B' ≥ 180°.
Both B and B' = 180° − B produce valid triangles (A + B' < 180°).
h = b sin A. If a < h → 0 triangles; a = h → 1; h < a < b → 2; a ≥ b → 1.
